_about: Declarative install manifest for the ~/.claude workbench. install.py + installer/{detect,deps,links,render,doctor,verify}.py read this. Everything is idempotent + fail-visible. {PYTHON}/{NODE}/{CLAUDE_DIR} are substituted from installer/detect.py. `ci_stub:true` steps are SKIPPED under `install.py --ci` (no network in CI; the manifest itself is the contract doctor/verify assert). Sections: prereqs (report-only, user must install) · deps (auto-installed binaries) · mcp_servers (claude mcp add) · plugins (claude plugin) · connectors (claude.ai UI) · post_steps · palette · doctor_probes.

prereqs.install_posix: sudo apt install python3 python3-pip   # or: brew install python@3.12
prereqs.install_windows: winget install Python.Python.3.12   # ships the 'py -3' launcher

prereqs.note: npm powers lean-ctx, tdd-guard and 7 npx-launched MCP servers.
prereqs.install_posix: nvm: curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.1/install.sh | bash && nvm install --lts   # or apt/brew

prereqs.note: Repo clone + the `install.py update` flow + hook git calls.
prereqs.install_posix: sudo apt install git   # or: brew install git

prereqs.note: Claude Code CLI — needed to register MCP servers and install plugins.

deps.note: Astral uv — installs semgrep/jcodemunch-mcp/jdocmunch-mcp on POSIX and launches the `fetch` MCP (uvx). Auto-installed via the official script; re-open the shell if `uv` isn't on PATH afterwards.
Windows installer for semgrep/jcodemunch-mcp/jdocmunch-mcp (POSIX uses uv). After install run `pipx ensurepath` once.

PyYAML powers the skill validator's front-matter parser (R2/R5/R6/R10 fidelity). Runtime hooks are pure stdlib and never import it; skills_lib degrades to a stdlib fallback (no crash) when it is absent, but the doctor's R9/R10 probe needs it for full fidelity.
Context-compression engine: the PreToolUse rewrite/redirect/observe hooks AND the lean-ctx MCP server both call this binary.
Code-intelligence MCP engine (PyPI: jcodemunch-mcp). Info + licensing: https://j.gravelle.us/jCodeMunch/descriptions.php
Docs-index MCP engine (PyPI: jdocmunch-mcp), jCodeMunch's docs twin. Full wiring + first index: scripts/install-jdocmunch.sh. Info + licensing: https://j.gravelle.us/jCodeMunch/descriptions.php
Dependency-graph engine (PyPI: graphifyy). POSIX uses scripts/install-graphify.sh (builds the claude-owned serve venv); the MCP is registered below via graphify_launcher.py.

mcp_servers.name: graphify
mcp_servers.note: portable python launcher — reconciles the settings.json/~/.claude.json graphify disagreement.

plugins._about: claude plugin marketplace add <repo> then claude plugin install <plugin>@<marketplace>. Idempotent (verify.py checks `claude plugin list`). Names are best-effort from the workbench notes; a wrong name WARNs (never crashes).

install.note: Mandatory: the ponytail+caveman gate denies all tools if disabled.

manual.note: GSD engine + gsd-* agents/skills (its /gsd:* command surface ships AS skills, so 0 files in commands/ is correct). Auto-installed best-effort via `npx get-shit-done-cc` when absent (skipped if already present); if it needs interaction, run `npx get-shit-done-cc@latest` yourself, then /gsd-update. Package name is the exact constant get-shit-done-cc (beware typosquats).

connectors.note: claude.ai connector (OAuth) — add via the claude.ai Connectors UI, NOT the CLI. Frontend asset-generation engine (image/video/3D/audio).
claude.ai connector — add via the claude.ai Connectors UI.

externals.note: gstack skill suite (/ship,/qa,/browse,...). Cloned by install.sh on consent; post_steps sync its pointer skills.
Powers the optional ast-grep MCP server (settings.json). Run `uv sync` inside after clone.

links._about: Skill trees that must be MATERIALIZED as real files (never symlinks) so Windows works. links.materialize() is idempotent verify-or-create.

post_steps.note: regenerate gstack pointer skills from the clone (trigger parity).
R1..R10 incl. R9 floor guard + R10 upstream-intactness (fails the install on a broken catalog or an edited locked skill).
